name: stat-tile
title: Stat Tile
description: Big-number KPI tile with label, value + unit, an intent-colored delta, and an optional inline sparkline — for dashboard header strips.

props.name: delta
props.type: { value: ReactNode; direction?: "up" | "down" | "flat"; intent?: "good" | "bad" | "neutral"; tooltip?: ReactNode }
props.description: Change vs. a prior period. direction is which way the number moved; intent is whether that is good; tooltip explains the comparison.

props.name: info
props.description: Info affordance beside the label — an icon button with a Tooltip.

props.name: interactive
props.description: Hover-lift, press, focus-ring, and pointer affordances for drill-down tiles.

clinicalNotes: `direction` and `intent` are deliberately independent, mirroring vitals-card: a falling readmission rate is good, a falling patient census may not be — the component never infers meaning from the number. Values are tabular-nums for aligned scanning across a KPI row. Deltas are never conveyed by color alone; the arrow and the +/- value carry the direction too.
notes: Layer-M0 scaffolding. Feeds dashboard header strips and VitalsOverviewPanel (M2).
